name: source-folder closed-loop step registry-edit appends a new entry to the operator registry yaml
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []\noperator_namespace: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/closed-loop-test.sh" --step registry-edit --registry .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml --add-entry google-new --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'planned: add google-new to registry' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
